signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: We are seeing indications of more cautious consumer behavior around the world in an uneven macroenvironment... we saw softness in digital traffic and higher levels of promotional activity across the marketplace.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Our higher-priced products, in particular, have been resilient with our $100 plus footwear models driving strong growth in units sold across the marketplace — but overall we have maintained lower markdown rates than many of our competitors.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: Looking forward, the impact of these risks is becoming clear. And as a result, we are adjusting our full-year financial outlook... we are taking a more prudent approach to our planning for the balance of the year given the increased macro headwinds.
